transcript.final_response:
SLOW: POST /api/orders took 850ms (200)
SLOW: GET /api/reports took 1200ms (200)
SLOW: POST /api/payments took 2000ms (500)
SLOW: PUT /api/users took 620ms (200)
Slow requests: 4 of 8 total
tool_calls:
total=0
slow=0
while IFS= read -r line; do
  if [[ $line =~ ^\[([^]]+)\][[:space:]]+([0-9]{3})[[:space:]]+([A-Z]+)[[:space:]]+([^[:space:]]+)[[:space:]]+([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
    ts="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
    status="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
    method="${BASH_REMATCH[3]}"
    url="${BASH_REMATCH[4]}"
    duration="${BASH_REMATCH[5]}"
    ((total++))
    if (( duration > 500 )); then
      ((slow++))
      echo "SLOW: $method $url took ${duration}ms ($status)"
    fi
  fi
done < /data/access.log

echo "Slow requests: $slow of $total total"

while IFS= read -r line; do
  printf 'LINE:%q\n' "$line"
  if [[ $line =~ ^\[([^]]+)\][[:space:]]+([0-9]{3})[[:space:]]+([A-Z]+)[[:space:]]+([^[:space:]]+)[[:space:]]+([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
    echo match
  else
    echo no
  fi
done < /data/access.log

line='[2024-01-15T10:00:01] 200 GET /api/users 150'
if [[ $line =~ ^\[.*\] ]]; then echo yes; else echo no; fi
if [[ $line =~ ^\[([^]]+)\] ]]; then echo yes2; else echo no2; fi
if [[ $line =~ ^\[([^\]]+)\] ]]; then echo yes3; else echo no3; fi

line='[2024-01-15T10:00:01] 200 GET /api/users 150'
pat='^\[([^\]]+)\][[:space:]]+([0-9]{3})[[:space:]]+([A-Z]+)[[:space:]]+([^[:space:]]+)[[:space:]]+([0-9]+)$'
if [[ $line =~ $pat ]]; then echo ok; declare -p BASH_REMATCH; else echo fail; fi

total=0
slow=0
pat='^\[([^\]]+)\][[:space:]]+([0-9]{3})[[:space:]]+([A-Z]+)[[:space:]]+([^[:space:]]+)[[:space:]]+([0-9]+)$'
while IFS= read -r line; do
  if [[ $line =~ $pat ]]; then
    ts="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
    status="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
    method="${BASH_REMATCH[3]}"
    url="${BASH_REMATCH[4]}"
    duration="${BASH_REMATCH[5]}"
    ((total++))
    if (( duration > 500 )); then
      ((slow++))
      echo "SLOW: $method $url took ${duration}ms ($status)"
    fi
  fi
done < /data/access.log

echo "Slow requests: $slow of $total total"
